name: Email Configuration Test
subject: Email Configuration Test — Project Offline ({date})
body:
This is an automated test message sent from Project Offline to verify that your email configuration is working correctly.

Configuration details:
  - Sent by: {project_manager}
  - Date: {date}
  - Application: Project Offline

If you received this message, your SMTP settings are configured correctly and email export is ready to use.

You can safely delete this message.
